---
title: "LSA Data Analysis"
toc: false
---

Every attempt recorded on the [Evaluation Chart](lsa-chart.qmd), analyzed: how
evenly time is spread across students, and what percentage of the class has
reached its own potential on each criterion (Gordon's "move ahead" rule of thumb
is 80%).

```{=html}
<div id="lsa-app">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/apps/lsa/lsa.css">

  <div id="lsa-stats" class="lsa-stats"></div>

  <div class="lsa-chart-card">
    <div class="lsa-chart-title">Attempts per student</div>
    <div class="lsa-chart-sub">The equal-time proxy the "suggest next" prompt optimizes for — the tighter the spread, the more even the class's time has been.</div>
    <div id="lsa-bars" class="lsa-bars"></div>
  </div>

  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;">Potential achieved, by criterion</h3>
  <div class="lsa-filter-row">
    <div class="lsa-field">
      <label for="lsa-filter-register">Register</label>
      <select id="lsa-filter-register">
        <option value="tonal">Tonal</option>
        <option value="rhythm">Rhythm</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div class="lsa-field">
      <label for="lsa-filter-text">Search</label>
      <input type="text" id="lsa-filter-text" placeholder="unit, criterion, family…">
    </div>
    <div class="lsa-field lsa-toggle-field" style="margin-top:1.1rem;">
      <input type="checkbox" id="lsa-filter-touched">
      <label for="lsa-filter-touched">Only criteria with attempts</label>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
    <table class="lsa-table">
      <thead id="lsa-criteria-thead">
        <tr>
          <th data-sort="register">Register</th>
          <th data-sort="unit">Book</th>
          <th data-sort="unit">Unit</th>
          <th data-sort="unit">Section · Criterion</th>
          <th data-sort="unit">Patterns</th>
          <th data-sort="pct">% achieved potential</th>
          <th data-sort="pct">Status</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="lsa-criteria-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <h3 style="font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:1rem;margin:1.5rem 0 .5rem;">Per student</h3>
  <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
    <table class="lsa-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Student</th>
          <th>Aptitude</th>
          <th>Teach attempts</th>
          <th>Eval attempts</th>
          <th>Total attempts</th>
          <th>Criteria at potential</th>
          <th>Last given</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody id="lsa-student-tbody"></tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <details class="lsa-raw">
    <summary>Raw attempt log (every recorded cell)</summary>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
      <table class="lsa-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Student</th><th>Criterion</th><th>Level</th>
            <th>Teach</th><th>Eval</th><th>Taught</th><th>Achieved</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody id="lsa-raw-tbody"></tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </details>

  <div style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <button type="button" class="lsa-btn" id="lsa-export-btn">Export JSON</button>
    <button type="button" class="lsa-btn lsa-danger" id="lsa-reset-btn">Reset data</button>
  </div>

  <script src="/apps/patterns/pattern-object.js"></script>
  <script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
  <script src="/apps/lsa/curriculum.js"></script>
  <script src="/apps/lsa/store.js"></script>
  <script src="/apps/lsa/prompt-engine.js"></script>
  <script src="/apps/lsa/analysis-app.js"></script>
</div>
```
